uplink.description: MICA sensor reading (TTN example bytes; warm-up: moldIndex Calculating, dB Preheating)
MICA sensor reading, all sensors warmed up with a real noise level
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds MICA reading; expected.data produced by running the ported codec, which reproduces the upstream source-of-truth decode (temperature 23.4 C, humidity 47.8 %, CO2 642 ppm, TVOC 120, PM2.5 8, PM10 14, numeric moldIndex 12, noise 45 dB).

uplink.description: MICA sensor reading near upper humidity / CO2, warm-up index/noise strings
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds MICA reading; expected.data produced by running the ported codec, which reproduces the upstream source-of-truth decode. Exercises the moldIndex==0xff -> 'Calculating' and dB==0xff -> 'Preheating' string branches.

uplink.description: Unrecognized message type byte returns an error (not a bare {})
uplink._note: Synthetic: byte0=9 is not one of the upstream dispatch values (0/1/2); the upstream decoder would return an empty object, which violates the output contract, so the ported codec returns an error instead.
